name: McLaren
description: Papaya-on-carbon board. Derived from the ClickUp McLaren Racing palette: carbon black chrome, anthracite panels, papaya (#FF8000) as the actionable accent, electric cyan (#00E5FF) as informational field labels (Piastri pattern). Cyan is informational, papaya is actionable — never both on one element.
source: ClickUp doc: App Theme: McLaren Racing
